{{Quote|Oh, if I'd known how much trouble it was being dictator, I'd have stayed on the farm.|Craw|<ref name="Droids (1995) 6">[[Droids (1995) 6|''Droids'' (1995) 6]]</ref>}}
'''Craw''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Targonnian]] who served as the self-styled [[Dictator-Forever]] of [[Targonn/Legends|Targonn]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was extremely self-absorbed and cared little for the troubles of his people, creating a 99 percent tax, and forcing child labor. The chief enforcer of his will was [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Steggus]]. Craw sought the secret of [[Savorium herb|savorium]] which he planned to utilize to stop the peasants under his rule from complaining about the poor conditions in which they lived. However, he was thwarted by the forces of [[Zorneth]].
